{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Aetheric disruption
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A major ritual caused a huge [[Aetheric disruption]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
